title: Sign Up Page (`[[...sign-up]]/page.tsx`)
content:
This file defines the sign-up page for the DocMed application. It leverages Clerk for authentication and provides both email/password and Google OAuth sign-up flows. The page features animated UI elements for a modern user experience. ## Key Features * **Client-side rendering (`'use client'`)**: Enables interactive features and state management. * **Clerk Integration**: Uses `@clerk/nextjs/legacy` for user sign-up and authentication. * **Email Verification**: Implements a multi-step sign-up process involving email code verification. * **Google OAuth**: Supports signing up via Google authentication. * **Animated UI Components**: Utilizes custom UI components like `AnimatedForm`, `Ripple`, `TechOrbitDisplay`, and `BoxReveal` for a visually engaging experience. * **Responsive Design**: Adapts to different screen sizes, with an orbit display on larger screens and the form on all screen sizes. ## Components and Hooks * **`useSignUp` (from `@clerk/nextjs/legacy`)**: Hook to manage the sign-up process. * **`useRouter` (from `next/navigation`)**: Hook for programmatic navigation. * **`AnimatedForm`**: A custom component for rendering sign-up forms with animations. * **`Ripple`, `TechOrbitDisplay`, `BoxReveal`**: Custom animation and display components. * **`Input`, `Label`**: Custom input and label components. ## State Management * `email`: Stores the user's email address. * `password`: Stores the user's password. * `code`: Stores the email verification code. * `pendingVerification`: Boolean flag to control the visibility of the verification step. * `error`: Stores any error messages during the sign-up process. * `loading`: Boolean flag to indicate the loading state of form submissions. ## Functions * **`handleSubmit`**: Handles the initial sign-up attempt using email and password. * **`handleVerify`**: Handles the email verification code submission. * **`handleGoogleSignUp`**: Initiates the Google OAuth sign-up flow. ## Usage Example This component is rendered as the main page content for the `/sign-up` route. ```tsx // app/sign-up/[[...sign-up]]/page.tsx // ... component code ... export default function SignUpPage() { // ... component logic ... return (
{/* Left — orbit display */} {/* ... orbit display elements ... */} {/* Right — form */}
{!pendingVerification ? ( <>

Already have an account?{' '} Sign in

) : ( /* Email verification step */
{/* ... verification form ... */}
)}
); } ```
